page_metadata.biotools__summary: An R package for the functional random forest (FunFor) algorithm. The FunFor algorithm is able to predict curve responses for new observations and select important variables from a large set of scalar predictors.
page_metadata.bioschemas__summary: An R package for the functional random forest (FunFor) algorithm. The FunFor algorithm is able to predict curve responses for new observations and select important variables from a large set of scalar predictors.
